name: video-auditor-app
description: App local Electron para auditoría inteligente de videos, análisis de estilo, reportes PDF/TXT y plantillas de edición.

scripts.check: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/windowManager.js && node --check src/app/appController.js && node --check src/database/sqliteConnection.js && node --check src/database/migrations.js && node --check src/services/ffmpegService.js && node --check src/modules/videoImport/videoImportController.js && node --check src/modules/videoImport/videoImportService.js && node --check src/modules/videoImport/videoValidator.js && node --check src/modules/videoImport/videoMetadataService.js && node --check src/modules/mediaProcessing/metadataExtractor.js && node --check src/modules/mediaProcessing/audioExtractor.js && node --check src/modules/mediaProcessing/frameExtractor.js && node --check src/modules/mediaProcessing/mediaProcessingService.js && node --check src/modules/mediaProcessing/processingController.js && node --check src/modules/cutDetection/sceneChangeDetector.js && node --check src/modules/cutDetection/cutFrequencyAnalyzer.js && node --check src/modules/cutDetection/visualRhythmAnalyzer.js && node --check src/modules/cutDetection/cutDetectionService.js && node --check src/modules/cutDetection/cutDetectionController.js && node --check src/modules/audioAnalysis/silenceDetector.js && node --check src/modules/audioAnalysis/audioRhythmAnalyzer.js && node --check src/modules/audioAnalysis/musicCueDetector.js && node --check src/modules/transcription/transcriptFormatter.js && node --check src/modules/transcription/localTranscriptionService.js && node --check src/modules/transcription/transcriptionController.js
